InputSummary.Inquiry: NARQ/XERTY;CA-/CRANSTON RI 02920/MC-000212/IR/BOP/V-000777/OWNR-GARCIA,DANIEL;CA-4190 HIGHWOOD RD/MOUND MN 55364/OWNR-GARCIA,DANIEL;CA-4190 HIGHWOOD RD/MOUND MN 55364

Intelliscore.CustomHeader: THE OBJECTIVE OF THE EXPERIAN INTELLISCORE MODEL IS TO PREDICT
SERIOUSLY DEROGATORY PAYMENT BEHAVIOR. SCORES RANGE FROM 0 TO 100
WHERE 0 REPRESENTS A HIGH RISK AND 100 REPRESENTS A LOW RISK.

RiskModel.ModelIndicator: Scorex PLUS Score for New Accounts
